item.title: Hands-on Time Series Anomaly Detection using Autoencoders, with Python
item.description: This blog post is to guide the reader towards the idea of anomaly detection with Neural Networks, combining the two subjects in one unique piece of code.

item.title: The Comprehensive Guide to Training and Running YOLOv8 Models on Custom Datasets
item.description: This guide will act as a comprehensive tutorial covering the many different ways to train and run YOLOv8 models, as well as the strengths and limitations of ...

item.title: OpenCV G-API: From Imperative to Declarative Pipelines
item.description: Complex Computer Vision Systems: Useful for surveillance, autonomous vehicles, and industrial inspection, where many processing stages need to be combined and optimized. 2. The G-API Architecture: 3-Layer Powerhouse G-API isn’t just a library of functions; it’s a framework with a unified API for image-processing pipelines across multiple ...

item.title: How CUMAD Accumulates Evidence to Unmask Compromised IoT Devices
item.description: In this paper we develop an effective and efficient framework to detect compromised IoT devices, named CUMAD (cumulative anomaly detection). In essence, CUMAD integrates an autoencoder-based anomaly detection subsystem with a sequential probability ratio test (SPRT)-based sequential hypothesis testing subsystem [6], [7]. In CUMAD, the normal behavior of each IoT device is learnt and modeled by an autoencoder.

item.title: Train YOLO for Object Detection on a Custom Dataset using Python
item.description: YOLO expects to find certain files and folders set up correctly in order to do the training on your custom dataset. First, you will need to open the file in the darknet/data/obj.names path where you put write your labels.

item.title: How to Create a Simple Object Detection System with Python and ImageAI
item.description: As you have seen, ImageAI library enables us to build an object detection system without having to deal with the complexity behind object detection model like ResNet or YOLO for custom objects.

item.title: Classifying objects from 3D CAD files - OpenCV Forum
item.description: Industrial inspection talks about “Machine Vision”. OpenCV industrial inspection.
